title: Chromatic Frames
description: Animated, smooth color-transitioning rainbow tooltip frames | Fully vanilla | Lightweight & adjustable | Jade & Enhanced/Chromatic Tooltips support | MC 1.21.2+
body:
![Chromatic Jade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d522b0f66f01093c8c55752f293ded7dbe859f1.gif)

## Overview

Chromatic Frames is a resourcepack that changes only the frames/borders of any inventory/game menu tooltip to loop through all the colors of the rainbow. Fully animated and no mods needed. Optional [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), [EnhancedTooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedtooltips) & [Chromatic Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chromatic-tooltips) support.

**Got an idea or is something missing? [[Quick Suggest it here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeNwFuQMNpgJ3zpGp7Xqoy6-L9HtcTJD3tdK35t_CIci-PcDw/viewform?usp=dialog)]**

## Features

- Chromatic Tooltip Frames (in Inventory & Game Menu)
- Chromatic Frames for Jade's Create, Classic & Dark Themes

Jade custom themes can be disabled by setting the selected theme's style in Jade's settings to "slim". Additionally, a configuration guide for adjusting animation speed has been included.

## Compatibility

- Gets overridden by Legendary & Obscure Tooltips, a supported alternative is EnhancedTooltips
- Acts as an add-on and is compatible with most other tooltip resourcepacks like Chromatic Tooltips
- Made for 1.21.2+ as it relies on a recent vanilla feature for inventory tooltips
- Custom animated Jade themes only work on versions 1.21.6+
***
[Showcased font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smooth-shaded-font) / [Submit feedback](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpLF-RLC95utvtUaEm9pXmwhpzo3kRg8XpJ-BFcLcI7ZnXAQ/viewform?usp=dialog)
